Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft'S Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted in part and denied in part. Defendant's vague and ambiguous objections are overruled.
The motion is granted as to No. 2, limited to the San Jose facility for the period 1999 to present.
The motion is denied as to Nos. 3, 4, and 5. The individuals' right to privacy outweighs the probative value, and there is no good cause.
The motion is granted as to No. 6, limited to the period 1999 to present.
The motion is granted as to No. 13, limited in time to the period 1999 to present.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order.
Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
